message:
chore(beads): flush xattr/fuzz-expansion + harness coverage tasks

Syncs the local SQLite issue DB to JSONL after the ext4 xattr parity,
fuzz-workspace expansion, and kernel-reference test work:

  * bd-nt3t (in_progress) — "Expand fuzz pipeline to cover all
    registered cargo-fuzz targets" — captures the manifest-driven
    discovery + 4 new targets just landed. Stays in_progress until
    nightly reports clean across all eight.
  * Adds / updates adjacent tasks for the new harness coverage
    (btrfs send-stream differential, ext4 xattr reference parity)
    and the repair-symbols / JBD2 / fast-commit fuzz coverage rows
    now annotated in FEATURE_PARITY.md.

Pure `br sync --flush-only` output — no code or doc change here.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
